scope.selection_note: Codex-only identity cleanup prep from current data/canonical/entities.jsonl, current entity merge and do-not-merge overrides, and read-only validateRepo duplicate_global_identity messages. Selected proposals are exact person identity shards with matching names and compatible titles/organizations. Broad community-board, committee, generic MTA, and borough-ambiguous collisions were excluded.
scope.backlog_caveat: The user described a 561-issue current validation backlog. A first read-only validateRepo inspection observed 561 duplicate_global_identity issues; by the final guard pass, concurrent repo changes had moved the current read-only count to 548 total duplicate_global_identity issues, including 458 entity duplicate_global_identity issues. This note anchors proposals to the final current guard pass.

proposal_guards: Every alias and target was verified as a current record_id in data/canonical/entities.jsonl.
No proposed alias is a current entity merge alias in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No proposed target is a current entity merge alias in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
Every alias and target pair is distinct.
No proposed pair is covered by a current entity do-not-merge guard.

Several proposed aliases or targets are current merge targets for other aliases; incoming aliases are recorded per proposal, but the requested guards only prohibit an already-merged alias and a target that is itself a merge alias.
excluded_current_duplicate_classes: Excluded community-board collisions where shared keys omit borough or board-name context.
Excluded broad committee, workplan, and roster-page collisions unless the selected entity was a specific named person.

Excluded generic MTA, MTA Board, LIRR, Metro-North, NYCT, Access-A-Ride, and department-wide collisions where source context could collapse institution, committee, office, or system labels incorrectly.
Excluded initials-only person pairs unless a richer exact-name target and strong source title context made the identity unambiguous; none of the final ten depend only on initials.
Excluded agency/office labels where one side was a role, bureau, or generic department label rather than the same named entity.

command_evidence.purpose: Read validateRepo duplicate_global_identity logic and confirm it uses identityKeysForRecord plus do-not-merge suppression.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval 'import { validateRepo } from "./packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts"; ... print duplicate_global_identity entity messages'
command_evidence.purpose: Read-only validator inspection without running the CLI validate command; first pass observed 561 duplicate_global_identity issues and printed entity duplicate messages for candidate selection.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<read-only candidate mining over data/canonical/entities.jsonl, current merges.json, current do-not-merge.json, and validateRepo duplicate_global_identity messages>'
command_evidence.purpose: Filtered entity duplicate candidates to pairs where both ids exist, alias is not a merge alias, target is not a merge alias, alias != target, and no do-not-merge guard applies.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<read selected entity records and local raw/sources/*/blocks.jsonl evidence text for proposed aliases and targets>'
command_evidence.purpose: Inspected canonical payloads, source ids, evidence refs, and local source-block quotes for the selected proposals.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<final read-only guard pass over selected pairs using validateRepo, entities.jsonl, merges.json, and do-not-merge.json>'
command_evidence.purpose: Final current guard pass reported 548 duplicate_global_identity issues total, 458 entity duplicate_global_identity issues, validator rows for all selected pairs, and no merge-alias or do-not-merge guard failures.
